title: SkillsFuture Jobseeker Support Scheme
text:
SkillsFuture Jobseeker Support Scheme - SupportGoWhere
SkillsFuture Jobseeker Support Scheme
Share link
Provides temporary financial support of up to $6,000 over 6 months to involuntarily unemployed individuals, to support them in finding a job that makes better use of their skills and experiences.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Payouts of up to $6,000 over 6 months
To qualify for payouts, individuals will have to apply online to participate in the scheme and take part in supported job search activities
Collapse all sections
About this support

Payouts of up to $6,000 over 6 months 

To qualify for payouts, individuals will have to apply online to participate in the scheme and take part in supported job search activities 

Who is this for?

Singapore Citizen or Permanent Resident, aged 21 and above 

Earned an average gross monthly income of $5,000 or less in the past 12 months* (excluding employer CPF contributions)

Previously employed in Singapore for at least six months in the past 12 months

Unemployed due to involuntary reasons such as retrenchment, cessation of business, dismissals or termination due to illness, injury or accident

Lives in a property in Singapore with annual value of $31,000 or less

Has not received a payout from this scheme in the past three years




* Average gross monthly income includes basic salary and extra wages such as overtime pay, commissions and bonuses. This includes only the period(s) where the individual is employed and earning an income.

How to apply?

You can learn more and apply for the scheme at https://go.gov.sg/jobseekersupport

Where can I find help?

View more details

Submit an enquiry

Scheme last updated 09 Feb 2026
